max_clear_with_next_piece: {next_piece_rule_text} {line_clear_rule_text} What is the maximum number of rows this next piece can clear?
{next_piece_rule_text} {line_clear_rule_text} Considering every rotation and horizontal position, how many rows can be cleared at most?
{next_piece_rule_text} {line_clear_rule_text} What is the largest possible line-clear count for the shown next piece?
{next_piece_rule_text} {line_clear_rule_text} What is the maximum row-clear count over all legal placements?
{next_piece_rule_text} {line_clear_rule_text} If the next piece is placed optimally, how many rows clear?
active_piece_shape_label: Which option names the falling piece shape?
Choose the option whose shape name matches the falling piece.
Which labeled option gives the tetromino shape of the falling piece?
Select the option with the correct falling-piece shape name.
Which option label matches the active falling piece shape?
drop_result_label: {fixed_drop_rule_text} {line_clear_rule_text} Which labeled board shows the final state?

full_row_count: How many rows are completely filled with blocks?
Count the rows with no empty cells.
How many board rows are full?
What is the number of completely filled rows?
How many rows have every cell filled?
one_gap_row_count: How many rows have exactly one empty cell?
Count the rows that are one cell away from full.
How many board rows have exactly one gap?
What is the number of rows with one empty cell?
How many rows are missing exactly one block?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_tetris_board: a Tetris board with colored locked blocks and tetromino pieces
code_prompt_defaults.tetris_rule_text: A tetromino falls straight down until it rests on the stack or the bottom of the board.
code_prompt_defaults.next_piece_rule_text: The NEXT piece may be rotated and moved sideways, then it falls straight down until it rests.
code_prompt_defaults.fixed_drop_rule_text: In the START board, the falling piece drops straight down from its shown position without moving sideways or rotating.
code_prompt_defaults.collision_time_rule_text: A timestep is one successful downward move by one row after the horizontal shift; do not count the failed collision move.
code_prompt_defaults.line_clear_rule_text: After the piece locks, every completely filled row clears and all rows above fall down by the number of cleared rows.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_line_clear_count: set "annotation" to an object mapping "board" and "next_piece" to their bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_line_clear_count: set "answer" to the maximum number of rows the NEXT piece can clear
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_active_piece_shape_label: set "annotation" to the bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] enclosing the falling piece on the board
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_active_piece_shape_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_drop_result_label: set "annotation" to the selected result-board bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_drop_result_label: set "answer" to only the selected option letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_row_occupancy_status_cou: set "annotation" to an array containing one whole-row bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] for each qualifying row
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_row_occupancy_status_count: set "answer" to the number of qualifying rows
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_drop_collision_time_valu: set "annotation" to an object mapping "start_piece" and "stop_witness" to arrays of cell bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_drop_collision_time_value: set "answer" to the number of successful downward timesteps
